text.title: Deprecated API Sweeper Recipe Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Deprecated API Sweeper Recipe methodology end-to-end. Each step declares input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: run-pluto
step.action: Run pluto against chart paths; capture JSON output.

step.name: run-kubent
step.action: Run kubent against live cluster; capture JSON output.

step.name: merge-and-dedupe
step.action: Normalise schemas; dedupe per API + source.

step.name: cite-replacement-api
step.action: Per finding, look up replacement API in upstream Kubernetes deprecation notes.
step.decision-gate: If replacement API unknown, mark `needs-research` and escalate.

step.name: compose-report
step.action: Emit sweep report JSON conforming to contract.
